modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about applications using USD's single sign-on (SSO)

full_description_text:  
I'm trying to find out which applications are compatible with the single sign-on setup in USD. I know it involves ADFS and Microsoft Entra ID, but I'm not sure what specific apps utilize this SSO environment. Any info on this would be helpful, thanks!
short_description: Inquiry about applications using USD's single sign-on (SSO)
